results.rendered_html:
sāptapada a. (dī f.), sāptapadīna a. [cf.  P. V. 2. 22 ] Formed by walking together seven steps, or by talking together seven words; yataḥ satāṃ saṃnatagātri saṃgataṃ manīṣibhiḥ sāptapadīnamucyate  Ku. 5. 39  (where the latter sense appears better);  Pt. 2. 43 , 4. 103. 
— daṃ, -naṃ
1 Circumambulation of the nuptial fire by the bride and bridegroom in seven steps (which makes the marriage tie irrevocable).
2 Friendship, intimacy.
